events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: gauge near cable tray, needle and scale out of focus. Work order references a limit, no readable value or second measurement. Stage rough-complete. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no readable measurement, cannot verify within tolerance. As competent inspector, would mark needs more info / unable to verify. But if work order limit not met? No value. Decision likely needs_more_info. Risk? Could be medium if out-of-tolerance could affect cable tray support/loading. But unknown. Component conditions none. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 70. value 0 because unreadable. confidence low. findings: gauge unreadable, no measurement recorded, cannot verify against work order limit. actions: re-measure with calibrated gauge in focus/readable, record value, compare to limit. references NEC Art. 392 (cable tray supports, fill, etc). Need ensure JSON valid.
